svg.title: Naija Wallet Engine Architecture
svg.desc: Clean architecture diagram showing API, Application, Domain, and Infrastructure layers with workers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of clients call the Naija Wallet API?')
sendPrompt('What do the Fastify routes do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What do the controllers do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does Fastify do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What entities are in the domain layer?')
sendPrompt('What typed errors exist in the domain layer?')
sendPrompt('What are the business rules in this system?')
sendPrompt('What repositories are in the infrastructure layer?')
sendPrompt('What database does this project use?')
sendPrompt('What does the Effect TS job queue do?')
sendPrompt('What does the logger do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does the notification worker do?')
sendPrompt('What does the reconciliation worker do?')
